title: Upcoming Events at St. Vrain Valley Schools Board Meetings
content:
Longmont's educational landscape will soon have some updates as members of our community are invited to attend upcoming board meetings for the School District 2 and Burlington Public Schools.

On August 1st, there is an opportunity for students who want direct admission offers from CU Denver through a new partnership between St. Vrain Valley Schools district office staff member and school counselors [Source(evidence:15)].

Additionally, there's news about teachers taking up opportunities to serve as senior volunteers in our schools which can earn community members credit toward their property taxes while supporting the students with valuable experience they bring along into classrooms every day [Source(evidence:14)].

Stay tuned for more updates on what's happening at St. Vrain Valley Schools and other upcoming events that you may not want to miss out!

title: City of Longmont to Perform Chip Seal on Francis Street July 6-15
content:
Residents should plan accordingly for potential disruptions in road traffic and stay informed about the project's progress from its scheduled start date through August 1st.

Key points:

* The city will perform a chip seal process, which involves laying down aggregate surfacing material over existing pavement.
* Traffic may be affected during this period due to necessary detours or temporary lane closures; alternative routes should also have been identified and communicated.
* It is important for residents who drive through Francis Street regularly (including cyclists) on the day of work to keep an eye out for updated information from city officials.

Watch next: Check with City Hall's official website, social media channels, or local news outlets such as TV station ABC News 13 Longmont and radio station KMGH Morning Edition- Noon Drive Home Road Reporter Sam Mims are good sources. Additionally, a brief statement should be issued by the city's Department of Public Works when work begins to advise residents about any immediate road closures.

Note: Incomplete information; please verify next week if there have been changes in project scope or completion status before sending this story out for publication.
missing_evidence_notes: No source documents are linked to this lead yet. Treat this as a verification assignment until public source material is attached or cited.
